<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"/>
  <title>Rebecca Ozias</title>
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,700;0,900;1,700&family=Plus+Jakarta+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
  <style>
    *, *::before, *::after { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
    :root {
      --pink:   #ff6b9d;
      --purple: #9b5de5;
      --blue:   #00bbf9;
      --yellow: #fee440;
      --green:  #00f5d4;
      --orange: #f15bb5;
      --dark:   #120d20;
      --mid:    #1e1530;
    }
    html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }
    body { font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; background: var(--dark); color: #fff; overflow-x: hidden; }
    nav {
      position: fixed; top: 0; width: 100%; z-index: 200;
      padding: 1.2rem 3rem;
      display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;
      background: rgba(18,13,32,0.88); backdrop-filter: blur(16px);
      border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(155,93,229,0.25);
    }
    .nav-logo { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 1.3rem; font-weight: 700; background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--pink), var(--purple), var(--blue)); -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; text-decoration: none; }
    .nav-links { display: flex; gap: 2rem; list-style: none; }
    .nav-links a { font-size: 0.78rem; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; text-decoration: none; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6); transition: color 0.3s; }
    .nav-links a:hover { color: var(--yellow); }
    .hero { min-height: 100vh; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; align-items: center; text-align: center; padding: 8rem 2rem 5rem; position: relative; overflow: hidden; }
    .blob { position: absolute; border-radius: 50%; filter: blur(90px); opacity: 0.22; animation: float 9s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .blob1 { width: 520px; height: 520px; background: var(--purple); top: -120px; left: -160px; }
    .blob2 { width: 420px; height: 420px; background: var(--pink); top: 45%; right: -120px; animation-delay: -3s; }
    .blob3 { width: 380px; height: 380px; background: var(--blue); bottom: -80px; left: 25%; animation-delay: -5s; }
    .blob4 { width: 260px; height: 260px; background: var(--yellow); top: 22%; left: 18%; animation-delay: -2s; }
    @keyframes float { 0%,100%{transform:translateY(0) scale(1)} 50%{transform:translateY(-28px) scale(1.04)} }
    .hero-eyebrow { font-size: 0.75rem; letter-spacing: 0.24em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--green); margin-bottom: 1.5rem; animation: fadeUp 0.8s ease both; }
    .hero-name { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: clamp(3.5rem, 9vw, 7.5rem); font-weight: 900; line-height: 1; margin-bottom: 1rem; animation: fadeUp 0.8s 0.15s ease both; }
    .hero-name .first { color: #fff; }
    .hero-name .last { display: block; background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--pink) 0%, var(--purple) 45%, var(--blue) 100%); -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; }
    .hero-tagline { font-size: 1.05rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7); max-width: 560px; line-height: 1.75; margin-bottom: 2.5rem; animation: fadeUp 0.8s 0.3s ease both; }
    .hero-tags { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: center; gap: 0.75rem; margin-bottom: 3rem; animation: fadeUp 0.8s 0.45s ease both; }
    .tag { padding: 0.5rem 1.2rem; border-radius: 999px; font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.04em; border: 1.5px solid; }
    .tag-pink   { color: var(--pink);   border-color: var(--pink);   background: rgba(255,107,157,0.1); }
    .tag-purple { color: var(--purple); border-color: var(--purple); background: rgba(155,93,229,0.1); }
    .tag-blue   { color: var(--blue);   border-color: var(--blue);   background: rgba(0,187,249,0.1); }
    .tag-yellow { color: var(--yellow); border-color: var(--yellow); background: rgba(254,228,64,0.1); }
    .tag-green  { color: var(--green);  border-color: var(--green);  background: rgba(0,245,212,0.1); }
    .tag-orange { color: var(--orange); border-color: var(--orange); background: rgba(241,91,181,0.1); }
    .hero-btns { display: flex; gap: 1rem; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: center; animation: fadeUp 0.8s 0.6s ease both; }
    .btn { padding: 0.9rem 2rem; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.82rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 6px; transition: all 0.3s; border: none; cursor: pointer; }
    .btn-primary { background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--pink), var(--purple)); color: #fff; box-shadow: 0 0 30px rgba(155,93,229,0.4); }
    .btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 0 50px rgba(155,93,229,0.65); }
    .btn-outline { background: transparent; color: #fff; border: 1.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.3); }
    .btn-outline:hover { border-color: var(--blue); color: var(--blue); transform: translateY(-2px); }
    @keyframes fadeUp { from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(28px)} to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)} }
    .scroll-hint { position: absolute; bottom: 2.5rem; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.3); font-size: 0.68rem; letter-spacing: 0.15em; text-transform: uppercase; animation: fadeUp 1s 1s ease both; }
    .scroll-line { width: 1px; height: 40px; background: linear-gradient(to bottom, var(--purple), transparent); animation: pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite; }
    @keyframes pulse { 0%,100%{opacity:0.3} 50%{opacity:1} }
    section { padding: 7rem 3rem; position: relative; }
    .section-inner { max-width: 1100px; margin: 0 auto; }
    .section-label { font-size: 0.7rem; letter-spacing: 0.22em; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 1rem; }
    .section-title { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 3rem); font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.2; margin-bottom: 2.5rem; }

    /* ABOUT */
    #about { background: var(--mid); }
    .about-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1.2fr 1fr; gap: 5rem; align-items: center; }
    .about-text p { font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.9; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.72); margin-bottom: 1.2rem; }
    .about-cards { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 1.2rem; }
    .info-card { padding: 1.8rem 1.4rem; border-radius: 14px; border: 1px solid; text-align: center; transition: transform 0.3s, box-shadow 0.3s; }
    .info-card:hover { transform: translateY(-5px); }
    .ic-icon { font-size: 2rem; margin-bottom: 0.7rem; }
    .ic-label { font-size: 0.62rem; letter-spacing: 0.15em; text-transform: uppercase; opacity: 0.5; margin-bottom: 0.4rem; }
    .ic-value { font-size: 0.88rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.45; }
    .card-pink   { border-color: rgba(255,107,157,0.4); background: rgba(255,107,157,0.07); } .card-pink .ic-value { color: var(--pink); }
    .card-purple { border-color: rgba(155,93,229,0.4);  background: rgba(155,93,229,0.07);  } .card-purple .ic-value { color: var(--purple); }
    .card-blue   { border-color: rgba(0,187,249,0.4);   background: rgba(0,187,249,0.07);   } .card-blue .ic-value { color: var(--blue); }
    .card-yellow { border-color: rgba(254,228,64,0.4);  background: rgba(254,228,64,0.07);  } .card-yellow .ic-value { color: var(--yellow); }
    .card-green  { border-color: rgba(0,245,212,0.4);   background: rgba(0,245,212,0.07);   } .card-green .ic-value { color: var(--green); }
    .card-orange { border-color: rgba(241,91,181,0.4);  background: rgba(241,91,181,0.07);  } .card-orange .ic-value { color: var(--orange); }

    /* PHOTOS */
    #photos { background: var(--dark); }
    .photos-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 2rem; }
    .photo-card { border-radius: 16px; overflow: hidden; border: 2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); position: relative; transition: transform 0.3s, box-shadow 0.3s; }
    .photo-card:hover { transform: translateY(-6px) scale(1.01); box-shadow: 0 24px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.5); }
    .photo-card img { width: 100%; height: 400px; object-fit: cover; object-position: center 20%; display: block; }
    .photo-caption { padding: 1.2rem 1.5rem; background: var(--mid); }
    .photo-caption .pc-tag { display: inline-block; padding: 0.25rem 0.75rem; border-radius: 999px; font-size: 0.68rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }
    .photo-caption h3 { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 0.3rem; }
    .photo-caption p { font-size: 0.82rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.55); line-height: 1.6; }

    /* ACADEMICS */
    #academics .acad-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr; gap: 2rem; }
    .acad-card { padding: 2.5rem 2rem; border-radius: 16px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07); background: var(--mid); position: relative; overflow: hidden; transition: transform 0.3s, box-shadow 0.3s; }
    .acad-card::before { content: ''; position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 4px; }
    .acad-pink::before   { background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--pink), var(--orange)); }
    .acad-purple::before { background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--purple), var(--blue)); }
    .acad-green::before  { background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--green), var(--blue)); }
    .acad-card:hover { transform: translateY(-6px); box-shadow: 0 24px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.45); }
    .acad-icon { font-size: 2.8rem; margin-bottom: 1.2rem; }
    .acad-category { font-size: 0.62rem; letter-spacing: 0.18em; text-transform: uppercase; opacity: 0.5; margin-bottom: 0.6rem; }
    .acad-title { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 1.35rem; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 0.8rem; line-height: 1.3; }
    .acad-desc { font-size: 0.88rem; line-height: 1.75; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6); }

    /* LEADERSHIP */
    #leadership { background: var(--mid); }
    .leadership-cards { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 2rem; margin-top: 0.5rem; }
    .lead-card { padding: 2.5rem 2rem; border-radius: 16px; border: 1px solid; position: relative; overflow: hidden; transition: transform 0.3s, box-shadow 0.3s; }
    .lead-card:hover { transform: translateY(-5px); }
    .lead-card-hasa { border-color: rgba(254,228,64,0.4); background: rgba(254,228,64,0.05); }
    .lead-card-fccla { border-color: rgba(255,107,157,0.4); background: rgba(255,107,157,0.05); }
    .lead-icon { font-size: 3rem; margin-bottom: 1rem; }
    .lead-badge { display: inline-block; padding: 0.3rem 0.9rem; border-radius: 999px; font-size: 0.65rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 1rem; }
    .badge-yellow { background: rgba(254,228,64,0.15); color: var(--yellow); border: 1px solid rgba(254,228,64,0.4); }
    .badge-pink { background: rgba(255,107,157,0.15); color: var(--pink); border: 1px solid rgba(255,107,157,0.4); }
    .lead-title { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 1.6rem; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 0.4rem; }
    .lead-subtitle { font-size: 0.82rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5); margin-bottom: 1.2rem; letter-spacing: 0.05em; }
    .lead-desc { font-size: 0.9rem; line-height: 1.8; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7); }
    .lead-points { list-style: none; margin-top: 1.2rem; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.8rem; }
    .lead-points li { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 0.8rem; font-size: 0.85rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.68); line-height: 1.6; }
    .lp-dot { width: 7px; height: 7px; border-radius: 50%; flex-shrink: 0; margin-top: 0.45rem; }

    /* SKILLS */
    .skills-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); gap: 1.5rem; }
    .skill-pill { padding: 1.6rem 1rem; border-radius: 12px; text-align: center; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07); background: var(--mid); transition: transform 0.3s, border-color 0.3s, box-shadow 0.3s; }
    .skill-pill:hover { transform: translateY(-5px); }
    .skill-pill.sp-pink:hover   { border-color: var(--pink);   box-shadow: 0 12px 40px rgba(255,107,157,0.2); }
    .skill-pill.sp-purple:hover { border-color: var(--purple); box-shadow: 0 12px 40px rgba(155,93,229,0.2); }
    .skill-pill.sp-blue:hover   { border-color: var(--blue);   box-shadow: 0 12px 40px rgba(0,187,249,0.2); }
    .skill-pill.sp-green:hover  { border-color: var(--green);  box-shadow: 0 12px 40px rgba(0,245,212,0.2); }
    .skill-pill.sp-yellow:hover { border-color: var(--yellow); box-shadow: 0 12px 40px rgba(254,228,64,0.2); }
    .sp-icon { font-size: 1.8rem; margin-bottom: 0.6rem; }
    .sp-name { font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 600; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.82); }

    /* CONTACT */
    #contact { background: var(--mid); text-align: center; }
    .contact-sub { font-size: 1rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.65); max-width: 500px; margin: 0 auto 3rem; line-height: 1.75; }
    .contact-links { display: flex; justify-content: center; gap: 1.2rem; flex-wrap: wrap; }
    .contact-btn { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.7rem; padding: 1rem 1.8rem; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 600; text-decoration: none; border: 1.5px solid; transition: all 0.3s; }
    .cb-pink   { color: var(--pink);   border-color: rgba(255,107,157,0.45); background: rgba(255,107,157,0.08); }
    .cb-pink:hover   { background: rgba(255,107,157,0.2); transform: translateY(-3px); }
    .cb-purple { color: var(--purple); border-color: rgba(155,93,229,0.45);  background: rgba(155,93,229,0.08); }
    .cb-purple:hover { background: rgba(155,93,229,0.2); transform: translateY(-3px); }
    .cb-blue   { color: var(--blue);   border-color: rgba(0,187,249,0.45);   background: rgba(0,187,249,0.08); }
    .cb-blue:hover   { background: rgba(0,187,249,0.2); transform: translateY(-3px); }
    footer { text-align: center; padding: 2.5rem; border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06); font-size: 0.76rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.28); }
    footer span { background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--pink), var(--purple)); -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; }
    @media (max-width: 900px) {
      nav { padding: 1.1rem 1.5rem; }
      .nav-links { gap: 1.2rem; }
      .about-grid, .leadership-cards, .photos-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 2rem; }
      #academics .acad-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
      .skills-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
      section { padding: 5rem 1.5rem; }
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body>

  <nav>
    <a href="#" class="nav-logo">Rebecca Ozias</a>
    <ul class="nav-links">
      <li><a href="#about">About</a></li>
      <li><a href="#photos">Gallery</a></li>
      <li><a href="#academics">Academics</a></li>
      <li><a href="#leadership">Leadership</a></li>
      <li><a href="#hospitality">Hospitality</a></li><li><a href="#skills">Skills</a></li>
      <li><a href="#contact">Contact</a></li>
    </ul>
  </nav>

  <!-- HERO -->
  <section class="hero" id="home">
    <div class="blob blob1"></div>
    <div class="blob blob2"></div>
    <div class="blob blob3"></div>
    <div class="blob blob4"></div>
    <p class="hero-eyebrow">✦ Welcome to my world ✦</p>
    <h1 class="hero-name">
      <span class="first">Rebecca</span>
      <span class="last">Ozias</span>
    </h1>
    <p class="hero-tagline">Business Marketing student at WPU — leader, communicator, two-time FCCLA President, and hospitality-trained event planner.</p>
    <div class="hero-tags">
      <span class="tag tag-pink">🎓 WPU Student</span>
      <span class="tag tag-purple">📈 Business Marketing</span>
      <span class="tag tag-blue">💬 Communication Minor</span>
      <span class="tag tag-yellow">⭐ HASA Treasurer</span>
      <span class="tag tag-green">🏆 FCCLA President × 2</span>
      <span class="tag tag-orange">🗳️ NJ FCCLA Delegate</span>
      <span class="tag tag-blue">🍽️ Hospitality &amp; Tourism</span>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-btns">
      <a href="#about" class="btn btn-primary">Learn More About Me</a>
      <a href="#contact" class="btn btn-outline">Get In Touch</a>
      <a href="data:application/pdf;base64," download="Rebecca_Ozias_Resume.pdf" class="btn btn-outline" style="border-color:rgba(0,245,212,0.5);color:var(--green);">📄 Download Resume</a>
    </div>
    <div class="scroll-hint"><span>Scroll</span><div class="scroll-line"></div></div>
  </section>

  <!-- ABOUT -->
  <section id="about">
    <div class="section-inner">
      <div class="about-grid">
        <div class="about-text">
          <p class="section-label" style="color:var(--green);">— About Me</p>
          <h2 class="section-title">Driven by <span style="color:var(--green);">Creativity</span> &amp; Connection</h2>
          <p>Hi! I'm Rebecca — a Business Marketing major at William Paterson University with a passion for strategy, storytelling, and community. I'm always thinking about how brands and people connect in meaningful ways.</p>
          <p>I served as President of FCCLA (Family, Career and Community Leaders of America) for two years, where I led my chapter, represented New Jersey as a voting delegate, and spoke at state conferences. That experience shaped me into the leader I am today.</p>
          <p>At WPU, I bring that same energy as Treasurer of HASA — managing finances, organizing events, and uplifting our campus community.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="about-cards">
          <div class="info-card card-pink">
            <div class="ic-icon">🏫</div>
            <div class="ic-label">University</div>
            <div class="ic-value">William Paterson University</div>
          </div>
          <div class="info-card card-purple">
            <div class="ic-icon">📊</div>
            <div class="ic-label">Major</div>
            <div class="ic-value">Business Marketing</div>
          </div>
          <div class="info-card card-blue">
            <div class="ic-icon">💬</div>
            <div class="ic-label">Minor</div>
            <div class="ic-value">Communication</div>
          </div>
          <div class="info-card card-yellow">
            <div class="ic-icon">⭐</div>
            <div class="ic-label">Club Role</div>
            <div class="ic-value">HASA Treasurer</div>
          </div>
          <div class="info-card card-green" style="grid-column: span 2;">
            <div class="ic-icon">🏆</div>
            <div class="ic-label">Former Role</div>
            <div class="ic-value">FCCLA President — 2 Years · NJ Voting Delegate</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- PHOTO GALLERY -->
  <section id="photos">
    <div class="section-inner">
      <p class="section-label" style="color:var(--pink);">— Gallery</p>
      <h2 class="section-title">Moments That <span style="color:var(--pink);">Define</span> Me</h2>
      <div class="photos-grid">
        <div class="photo-card">
          <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Rebecca Ozias at NJ FCCLA as Voting Delegate" />
          <div class="photo-caption">
            <span class="pc-tag" style="background:rgba(255,107,157,0.15);color:var(--pink);border:1px solid rgba(255,107,157,0.4);">🗳️ NJ FCCLA</span>
            <h3>Voting Delegate</h3>
            <p>Representing New Jersey FCCLA as a Voting Delegate — bringing her chapter's voice to the state conference.</p>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="photo-card">
          <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Rebecca Ozias speaking at podium FCCLA" />
          <div class="photo-caption">
            <span class="pc-tag" style="background:rgba(155,93,229,0.15);color:var(--purple);border:1px solid rgba(155,93,229,0.4);">🎤 Leadership</span>
            <h3>Speaking at State Conference</h3>
            <p>Taking the stage and leading with confidence — a true testament to two years of FCCLA presidential leadership.</p>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="photo-card" style="grid-column: span 2;">
          <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Rebecca with FCCLA chapter group photo" style="height:420px;object-position:center center;" />
          <div class="photo-caption">
            <span class="pc-tag" style="background:rgba(0,245,212,0.15);color:var(--green);border:1px solid rgba(0,245,212,0.4);">🤝 Community</span>
            <h3>FCCLA Chapter — Team Photo</h3>
            <p>Leading and representing the chapter at the NJ FCCLA State Conference — proof that great leadership is built on great community.</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- ACADEMICS -->
  <section id="academics">
    <div class="section-inner">
      <p class="section-label" style="color:var(--blue);">— Academics</p>
      <h2 class="section-title">My <span style="color:var(--blue);">Academic</span> Journey</h2>
      <div class="acad-grid">
        <div class="acad-card acad-pink">
          <div class="acad-icon">📈</div>
          <div class="acad-category">Primary Major</div>
          <h3 class="acad-title">Business Marketing</h3>
          <p class="acad-desc">Studying consumer behavior, digital marketing, brand management, market research, and strategic communications — building the skills to launch and grow compelling brands.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="acad-card acad-purple">
          <div class="acad-icon">🎙️</div>
          <div class="acad-category">Minor</div>
          <h3 class="acad-title">Communication</h3>
          <p class="acad-desc">Exploring interpersonal communication, media studies, public speaking, and organizational communication — skills that power every great marketing campaign.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="acad-card acad-green">
          <div class="acad-icon">🏛️</div>
          <div class="acad-category">Institution</div>
          <h3 class="acad-title">William Paterson University</h3>
          <p class="acad-desc">Located in Wayne, NJ — WPU's Cotsakos College of Business provides hands-on, real-world business education with strong industry connections in the NY metro area.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- LEADERSHIP -->
  <section id="leadership">
    <div class="section-inner">
      <p class="section-label" style="color:var(--yellow);">— Leadership</p>
      <h2 class="section-title">Making an <span style="color:var(--yellow);">Impact</span> Everywhere I Go</h2>
      <div class="leadership-cards">
        <div class="lead-card lead-card-fccla">
          <div class="lead-icon">🏆</div>
          <span class="lead-badge badge-pink">2 Years</span>
          <h3 class="lead-title" style="color:var(--pink);">FCCLA President</h3>
          <p class="lead-subtitle">Family, Career and Community Leaders of America · Newark Vocational School</p>
          <p class="lead-desc">Served as chapter President for two consecutive years, leading peers, representing NJ at the state level as a Voting Delegate, and speaking at conferences.</p>
          <ul class="lead-points">
            <li><div class="lp-dot" style="background:var(--pink);"></div>Led and managed chapter activities, meetings, and community initiatives over two full years</li>
            <li><div class="lp-dot" style="background:var(--orange);"></div>Selected as a New Jersey FCCLA Voting Delegate at the state conference</li>
            <li><div class="lp-dot" style="background:var(--purple);"></div>Delivered speeches and presentations at state-level events</li>
            <li><div class="lp-dot" style="background:var(--blue);"></div>Mentored fellow members and built a strong, engaged chapter community</li>
          </ul>
        </div>
        <div class="lead-card lead-card-hasa">
          <div class="lead-icon">🌟</div>
          <span class="lead-badge badge-yellow">Current Role</span>
          <h3 class="lead-title" style="color:var(--yellow);">HASA Treasurer</h3>
          <p class="lead-subtitle">Hispanic American Student Association · William Paterson University</p>
          <p class="lead-desc">Managing the financial operations that allow HASA to run meaningful events and programs, while celebrating and uplifting the Hispanic community at WPU.</p>
          <ul class="lead-points">
            <li><div class="lp-dot" style="background:var(--yellow);"></div>Managing club budgets and tracking all expenditures for HASA events</li>
            <li><div class="lp-dot" style="background:var(--green);"></div>Collaborating with the executive board to allocate funds effectively</li>
            <li><div class="lp-dot" style="background:var(--blue);"></div>Supporting cultural programming that celebrates Hispanic heritage on campus</li>
            <li><div class="lp-dot" style="background:var(--pink);"></div>Fostering an inclusive, welcoming space for all students at WPU</li>
          </ul>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>


  <!-- HOSPITALITY & TOURISM -->
  <section id="hospitality" style="background:var(--dark);">
    <div class="section-inner">
      <p class="section-label" style="color:var(--orange);">— Education &amp; Certifications</p>
      <h2 class="section-title">Hospitality &amp; Tourism <span style="color:var(--orange);">Foundation</span></h2>
      <p style="font-size:1rem;line-height:1.85;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.72);max-width:750px;margin-bottom:3rem;">My education in Hospitality &amp; Tourism at Newark Vocational High School gave me a powerful foundation that directly amplifies my marketing career. Understanding how to deliver exceptional guest experiences, manage events, and read customer needs is the secret weapon behind every great marketer.</p>
      <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:2rem;margin-bottom:3rem;">
        <div class="acad-card" style="border:1px solid rgba(241,91,181,0.3);background:rgba(241,91,181,0.05);border-radius:16px;padding:2rem;">
          <div style="font-size:2.5rem;margin-bottom:1rem;">🍽️</div>
          <div style="font-size:0.62rem;letter-spacing:0.18em;text-transform:uppercase;opacity:0.5;margin-bottom:0.5rem;">Area of Study</div>
          <h3 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.2rem;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:0.7rem;">Hospitality &amp; Tourism</h3>
          <p style="font-size:0.85rem;line-height:1.7;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.6);">Deep dive into the hospitality industry — hotel management, tourism marketing, and the business of creating memorable guest experiences.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="acad-card" style="border:1px solid rgba(0,187,249,0.3);background:rgba(0,187,249,0.05);border-radius:16px;padding:2rem;">
          <div style="font-size:2.5rem;margin-bottom:1rem;">🎪</div>
          <div style="font-size:0.62rem;letter-spacing:0.18em;text-transform:uppercase;opacity:0.5;margin-bottom:0.5rem;">Hands-On Role</div>
          <h3 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.2rem;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:0.7rem;">Event Planner</h3>
          <p style="font-size:0.85rem;line-height:1.7;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.6);">Organized and managed school-based events from concept to execution — developing themes, coordinating vendors, assisting with budgets, and scheduling.</p>
        </div>

      </div>

      <!-- Certifications -->
      <h3 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.6rem;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:1.5rem;">Certifications &amp; <span style="color:var(--yellow);">Awards</span></h3>
      <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:1.5rem;">
        <div style="padding:1.8rem 1.5rem;border-radius:14px;border:1px solid rgba(254,228,64,0.35);background:rgba(254,228,64,0.06);text-align:center;transition:transform 0.3s;" onmouseover="this.style.transform='translateY(-5px)'" onmouseout="this.style.transform='translateY(0)'">
          <div style="font-size:2rem;margin-bottom:0.7rem;">🛡️</div>
          <div style="font-size:0.65rem;letter-spacing:0.15em;text-transform:uppercase;opacity:0.5;margin-bottom:0.4rem;">Certification</div>
          <div style="font-size:0.9rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--yellow);line-height:1.4;">ServSafe Food Handler</div>
        </div>
        <div style="padding:1.8rem 1.5rem;border-radius:14px;border:1px solid rgba(255,107,157,0.35);background:rgba(255,107,157,0.06);text-align:center;transition:transform 0.3s;" onmouseover="this.style.transform='translateY(-5px)'" onmouseout="this.style.transform='translateY(0)'">
          <div style="font-size:2rem;margin-bottom:0.7rem;">⭐</div>
          <div style="font-size:0.65rem;letter-spacing:0.15em;text-transform:uppercase;opacity:0.5;margin-bottom:0.4rem;">Award</div>
          <div style="font-size:0.9rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--pink);line-height:1.4;">Guest Service Gold</div>
        </div>
        <div style="padding:1.8rem 1.5rem;border-radius:14px;border:1px solid rgba(0,187,249,0.35);background:rgba(0,187,249,0.06);text-align:center;transition:transform 0.3s;" onmouseover="this.style.transform='translateY(-5px)'" onmouseout="this.style.transform='translateY(0)'">
          <div style="font-size:2rem;margin-bottom:0.7rem;">🏅</div>
          <div style="font-size:0.65rem;letter-spacing:0.15em;text-transform:uppercase;opacity:0.5;margin-bottom:0.4rem;">Certification</div>
          <div style="font-size:0.9rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--blue);line-height:1.4;">Certified Guest Service Professional (CGSP)</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- How it connects to marketing -->
      <div style="margin-top:3rem;padding:2.5rem;border-radius:16px;border:1px solid rgba(241,91,181,0.3);background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(241,91,181,0.07),rgba(155,93,229,0.07));">
        <h3 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.4rem;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:1rem;">How Hospitality <span style="color:var(--orange);">Supercharges</span> My Marketing</h3>
        <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:1.5rem;">
          <div style="display:flex;gap:1rem;align-items:flex-start;">
            <span style="font-size:1.4rem;flex-shrink:0;">🎯</span>
            <div><strong style="color:var(--orange);">Customer-First Mindset</strong><p style="font-size:0.85rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.65);margin-top:0.3rem;line-height:1.6;">Years of hospitality training means I always think about the end consumer — making my marketing strategies more empathetic and effective.</p></div>
          </div>
          <div style="display:flex;gap:1rem;align-items:flex-start;">
            <span style="font-size:1.4rem;flex-shrink:0;">🎪</span>
            <div><strong style="color:var(--pink);">Event &amp; Experiential Marketing</strong><p style="font-size:0.85rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.65);margin-top:0.3rem;line-height:1.6;">Real event planning experience gives me a unique edge in experiential marketing, brand activations, and live campaigns.</p></div>
          </div>
          <div style="display:flex;gap:1rem;align-items:flex-start;">
            <span style="font-size:1.4rem;flex-shrink:0;">💬</span>
            <div><strong style="color:var(--blue);">Service &amp; Brand Experience</strong><p style="font-size:0.85rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.65);margin-top:0.3rem;line-height:1.6;">Guest service certifications taught me that brand loyalty is built through every single interaction — a core principle of modern marketing.</p></div>
          </div>
          <div style="display:flex;gap:1rem;align-items:flex-start;">
            <span style="font-size:1.4rem;flex-shrink:0;">📋</span>
            <div><strong style="color:var(--green);">Budget &amp; Operations</strong><p style="font-size:0.85rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.65);margin-top:0.3rem;line-height:1.6;">Hands-on budget planning and vendor coordination built real operational skills that complement strategic marketing roles.</p></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- SKILLS -->
  <section id="skills">
    <div class="section-inner">
      <p class="section-label" style="color:var(--green);">— Skills</p>
      <h2 class="section-title">What I <span style="color:var(--green);">Bring</span> to the Table</h2>
      <div class="skills-grid">
        <div class="skill-pill sp-pink"><div class="sp-icon">📣</div><div class="sp-name">Marketing Strategy</div></div>
        <div class="skill-pill sp-purple"><div class="sp-icon">🧠</div><div class="sp-name">Brand Management</div></div>
        <div class="skill-pill sp-blue"><div class="sp-icon">📱</div><div class="sp-name">Social Media Marketing</div></div>
        <div class="skill-pill sp-green"><div class="sp-icon">📊</div><div class="sp-name">Market Research</div></div>
        <div class="skill-pill sp-yellow"><div class="sp-icon">🎤</div><div class="sp-name">Public Speaking</div></div>
        <div class="skill-pill sp-pink"><div class="sp-icon">✍️</div><div class="sp-name">Content Writing</div></div>
        <div class="skill-pill sp-purple"><div class="sp-icon">💰</div><div class="sp-name">Financial Planning</div></div>
        <div class="skill-pill sp-blue"><div class="sp-icon">🤝</div><div class="sp-name">Team Leadership</div></div>
        <div class="skill-pill sp-green"><div class="sp-icon">📡</div><div class="sp-name">Communication</div></div>
        <div class="skill-pill sp-yellow"><div class="sp-icon">🎯</div><div class="sp-name">Campaign Planning</div></div>
        <div class="skill-pill sp-pink"><div class="sp-icon">🔍</div><div class="sp-name">Consumer Behavior</div></div>
        <div class="skill-pill sp-purple"><div class="sp-icon">🌐</div><div class="sp-name">Digital Marketing</div></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- CONTACT -->
  <section id="contact">
    <div class="section-inner">
      <p class="section-label" style="color:var(--purple);">— Contact</p>
      <h2 class="section-title">Let's <span style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--pink),var(--purple),var(--blue));-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;">Connect</span></h2>
      <p class="contact-sub">Whether you're a recruiter, classmate, or fellow marketing enthusiast — I'd love to hear from you!</p>
      <div class="contact-links">
        <a href="/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#98eafdfafdfbfbf9f7e2f1f9ebaaacd8fff5f9f1f4b6fbf7f5" class="contact-btn cb-pink"><span>✉️</span> Send Me an Email</a>
        <a href="https://linkedin.com" target="_blank" class="contact-btn cb-purple"><span>💼</span> Connect on LinkedIn</a>
        <a href="https://instagram.com/becca_corporation" target="_blank" class="contact-btn cb-blue"><span>📸</span> Follow on Instagram</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <footer>
    <p>© 2025 <span>Rebecca Ozias</span> · William Paterson University · Business Marketing &amp; Communication · HASA Treasurer · FCCLA P
